task: GitHub Profile README Redesign — Alien Theme

items.description: Research YouTube Music 'Now Playing' widget for GitHub README (equivalent to Spotify novatorem)
steps: Search for existing YouTube Music GitHub README widgets
If none exist, evaluate feasibility of building one (API availability, auth)
Document finding: available / buildable / not possible

items.description: Research alien/space-themed GitHub README components (colors, animations, star effects)
steps: Find capsule-render options for space/alien themes
Find or create star animation SVG for header
Identify green/purple/dark color palette matching the alien GIF
Document all usable resources

items.description: Dynamic weather globe — Earth with Menlo Park weather, animated, alien-themed
steps: Research existing weather widgets for GitHub README
Research globe/Earth visualization options (animated GIF or SVG)
Build GitHub Action to generate daily weather globe GIF for Menlo Park, CA
Style must match alien GIF theme (green/purple/space)
Place next to alien GIF in layout

items.description: Fix LinkedIn/GitHub/Gmail icons — consistent, small, working
steps: Test multiple icon sources to find one that reliably loads on GitHub
All 3 icons render at same size
Verify by loading github.com/zw-g in browser

items.description: Replace intro text with alien-themed animated header (keep original text)
steps: Create space-themed header with star animation or slide effect
Text preserved exactly: 'Hi there 👋 welcome to my Github! I'm a Software Engineer @ Meta Core Feed Ranking team passionate about Automation.'
Visual style matches alien GIF (green/purple/space colors)
Verify animation works on GitHub

items.description: Add social icons: Instagram + Facebook (alongside LinkedIn/GitHub/Gmail)
steps: Add Instagram and Facebook icons in same style as other icons
Need Papa's Instagram and Facebook profile URLs
All 5 icons consistent size and style

items.description: YouTube Music widget or remove music section
steps: If widget exists: integrate it
If buildable: build it
If not possible: remove music section entirely, don't leave ugly placeholder
Include: Python, SQL, C++, PHP, terminal/CLI tools
Include modern AI tools: Claude/Anthropic, OpenAI, Google AI
Visual style matches alien theme
May need custom badges for AI tools if none exist
Use github-readme-activity-graph or similar with alien color scheme
Green/purple palette matching GIF
Verify it loads reliably
Screenshot at 1440px desktop width
Screenshot at 390px mobile width
Click 'more about me' and verify expanded state
Check ALL images load (0 broken)
Verify animations work
Check both light and dark GitHub themes
